_comment: Buyer-intent questions a real shopper might ask an AI assistant. The weekly AIO job asks Claude (with live web search) each of these, then records which tracked brands get named and in what order -- a 'share of voice in AI answers' signal over time. Edit freely.
_honesty_note: AI answers are non-deterministic and depend on the model + live web results, so read this as directional share-of-voice over time, not a fixed ranking. Runs weekly and only when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set.
